gt_sql: SELECT T2.Reputation, T2.UpVotes FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Text = 'fine, you win :)'
pred_sql: SELECT u.Reputation, u.UpVotes FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id WHERE TRIM(c.Text) LIKE 'fine, you win :%';
question: Give the user's reputation and up vote number of the user that commented "fine, you win :)".
